auth.label: API Token
auth.description: BotStar API token sent as a Bearer token. Copy it from the BotStar account profile page: https://app.botstar.com/account/profile.

actions.name: create_bot
actions.description: Create a new BotStar bot.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a BotStar bot.

team_name.description: The BotStar team name associated with the bot.

actions.name: create_bot_attribute
actions.description: Create an attribute on a BotStar bot.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

anyOf.description: A string or date attribute value.
A string or date attribute value.

localizedValues.description: Language-specific attribute values keyed by BotStar field name such as value_es.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a BotStar bot attribute.

data_type.description: The BotStar bot attribute data type.

desc.description: The bot attribute description when returned.

anyOf.description: A string or date attribute value.

actions.name: create_cms_entity
actions.description: Create a BotStar CMS entity.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

data_type.description: The BotStar CMS field data type.

options.description: Field options such as predefined_data or entity_id.

items.description: A field definition to create with a BotStar CMS entity.

fields.description: Fields to create with the CMS entity.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a BotStar CMS entity.

data_type.description: The BotStar CMS field data type.

options.description: Field options returned by BotStar when available.

fields.description: The CMS entity fields returned by BotStar.

actions.name: create_cms_entity_item
actions.description: Create an item in a BotStar CMS entity.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

status.description: The BotStar CMS entity item status.

data.description: Dynamic CMS item field values keyed by BotStar field unique name, excluding name and status.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a BotStar CMS entity item.

id.description: The BotStar CMS entity item ID.

status.description: The BotStar CMS entity item status.

entity_id.description: The BotStar CMS entity ID associated with the item.

outputSchema.description: A BotStar CMS entity item result.

actions.name: create_user_attribute
actions.description: Create a custom user attribute field for a BotStar bot.

field_name.description: The custom user attribute field name.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a custom BotStar user field.

id.description: The BotStar custom user attribute ID.

field_name.description: The custom user attribute field name.

outputSchema.description: A BotStar custom user attribute result.

actions.name: delete_bot_attribute
actions.description: Delete a BotStar bot attribute.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a BotStar bot attribute.

status.description: The status string returned by BotStar.

actions.name: delete_cms_entity
actions.description: Delete a BotStar CMS entity.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a BotStar CMS entity.

status.description: The status string returned by BotStar.

actions.name: delete_cms_entity_item
actions.description: Delete an item from a BotStar CMS entity.

entityItemId.description: The BotStar CMS entity item ID.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a BotStar CMS entity item.

status.description: The status string returned by BotStar.

actions.name: get_bot
actions.description: Get one BotStar bot by ID.

inputSchema.description: Input identifying one BotStar bot.

team_name.description: The BotStar team name associated with the bot.

actions.name: get_cms_entity
actions.description: Get one BotStar CMS entity by ID.

env.description: The BotStar environment to read or mutate.

inputSchema.description: Input identifying one BotStar CMS entity.

data_type.description: The BotStar CMS field data type.

options.description: Field options returned by BotStar when available.

fields.description: The CMS entity fields returned by BotStar.

actions.name: get_cms_entity_item
actions.description: Get one item from a BotStar CMS entity.

entityItemId.description: The BotStar CMS entity item ID.

env.description: The BotStar environment to read or mutate.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving one BotStar CMS entity item.

id.description: The BotStar CMS entity item ID.

status.description: The BotStar CMS entity item status.

entity_id.description: The BotStar CMS entity ID associated with the item.

outputSchema.description: A BotStar CMS entity item result.

actions.name: get_user
actions.description: Get a BotStar audience user by bot ID and user ID.

inputSchema.description: Input identifying a BotStar audience user.

board_id.description: The BotStar board ID associated with the user.

name.description: The user's full name when available.

first_name.description: The user's first name when available.

last_name.description: The user's last name when available.

email.description: The user's email address when available.

channel.description: The channel through which the user interacted.

actions.name: list_bot_attributes
actions.description: List attributes configured for a BotStar bot.

env.description: The BotStar environment to read or mutate.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing BotStar bot attributes.

data_type.description: The BotStar bot attribute data type.

desc.description: The bot attribute description when returned.

anyOf.description: A string or date attribute value.

attributes.description: The bot attributes returned by BotStar.

actions.name: list_bots
actions.description: List bots available to the configured BotStar API token.

inputSchema.description: The empty input payload for this BotStar action.

team_name.description: The BotStar team name associated with the bot.

actions.name: list_cms_entities
actions.description: List CMS entities configured for a BotStar bot.

env.description: The BotStar environment to read or mutate.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing BotStar CMS entities.

data_type.description: The BotStar CMS field data type.

options.description: Field options returned by BotStar when available.

fields.description: The CMS entity fields returned by BotStar.

entities.description: The CMS entities returned by BotStar.

actions.name: list_cms_entity_items
actions.description: List items in a BotStar CMS entity.

env.description: The BotStar environment to read or mutate.

limit.description: The maximum number of items to return.

name.description: Filter CMS entity items by name.

status.description: The BotStar CMS entity item status.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing BotStar CMS entity items.

id.description: The BotStar CMS entity item ID.

status.description: The BotStar CMS entity item status.

entity_id.description: The BotStar CMS entity ID associated with the item.

items.description: The CMS entity items returned by BotStar.

actions.name: publish_bot
actions.description: Publish BotStar bot changes to the live environment.

inputSchema.description: Input identifying one BotStar bot.

status.description: The status string returned by BotStar.

actions.name: update_bot_attribute
actions.description: Update an existing BotStar bot attribute.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

anyOf.description: A string or date attribute value.
A string or date attribute value.

localizedValues.description: Language-specific attribute values keyed by BotStar field name such as value_es.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a BotStar bot attribute.

attribute.description: The raw BotStar object returned by the Public API.

outputSchema.description: A BotStar bot attribute update result.

actions.name: update_cms_entity
actions.description: Update a BotStar CMS entity.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a BotStar CMS entity.

status.description: The status string returned by BotStar.

actions.name: update_cms_entity_item
actions.description: Update an item in a BotStar CMS entity.

entityItemId.description: The BotStar CMS entity item ID.

env.description: The BotStar environment target for mutation endpoints.

name.description: The updated CMS entity item name.

status.description: The BotStar CMS entity item status.

data.description: Dynamic CMS item field values keyed by BotStar field unique name, excluding name and status.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a BotStar CMS entity item.

status.description: The status string returned by BotStar.

actions.name: update_user_attributes
actions.description: Update attributes on a BotStar audience user.

anyOf.description: A string, date, or empty string user attribute value.

attributes.description: User attributes to update by BotStar field name.

anyOf.description: A string, date, or empty string user attribute value.
